_output_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — target filesystem path for the marshalled artifact.

_phase_status.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — workflow state (drives C4 requirements-table branch).

field_name.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Zod field path emitted in this column.

header_text.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — text printed in the header row.

width.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — preferred column width in Excel units.

type_hint.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — Excel cell-type hint for the marshaller.

required.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — whether marshaller should error on null.

items.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — single column-layout instruction (first-class per C5).

_columns_plan.description: x-ui-surface=internal:xlsx-marshaller — optional layout instructions (first-class per C5).

field_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — dotted path within the phase schema (e.g., "rows[].math_derivation").

introduced_in.description: x-ui-surface=internal:methodology-drift-check — schema semver where this field was added.

rationale.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — reviewer-facing reason the insertion was made.

kb_source.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — KB file that motivated the insertion, if any.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — methodology insertion (first-class per C5).

_insertions.description: x-ui-surface=section:Methodology Lineage — optional methodology insertions applied to this phase (first-class per C5).

phase_number.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — methodology phase number (0-12) per plan §4.5.

phase_slug.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — URL-safe slug (e.g., "requirements-table"). Also the xlsx sheet slug.

phase_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — human-facing phase title (e.g., "Phase 6 — Extract Requirements Table").

schema_version.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — Zod schema semver (e.g., "1.0.0") for drift-detection.

project_id.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — parent project id; keys workbook + PDF filename.

project_name.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — project display name; rendered at top and used as xlsx workbook title.

author.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — emitting agent or human reviewer identifier.

generator.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — tool that produced this artifact (e.g., "product-helper@0.1.0").

revision.description: x-ui-surface=page-header — monotonic revision counter per (project, phase).

_upstream_refs.description: x-ui-surface=internal:provenance — paths to upstream artifacts (T6 envelope: ≥11 per spec — all M1..M8 inputs).

summary.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Summary — prose summary (≤500 words) of the recommended architecture.

prior_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — dotted path into the entry frontmatter (e.g., "cost_curves.api_usd_per_1m_tokens_sonnet_input").

expected_kind.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — expected result_shape.kind; resolver fails closed if mismatch.

items.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — typed pointer from a mathDerivation into KB-8 priors.

cited_priors.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Summary — §6.3 atlas priors cited in the summary prose.

context.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Diagrams > Context — Mermaid source for the system-context diagram (actors + boundary).

use_case.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Diagrams > Use Case — Mermaid source for the use-case diagram.

class.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Diagrams > Class — Mermaid source for the class/data-entity diagram.

sequence.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Diagrams > Sequence — Mermaid source for the primary-flow sequence diagram.

decision_network.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Diagrams > Decision Network — Mermaid source for the Crawley decision-network graph.

mermaid_diagrams.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Diagrams — five canonical Mermaid sources.

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto — alternative name (e.g., "Serverless + managed Postgres").

summary.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto — one-sentence description of the architecture shape.

value.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — computed point value (or sentinel string like "NEEDS_PRIOR").

units.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — units (e.g., "USD/month", "ms p95", "% uptime").

derivation.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — plain-English or LaTeX formula used (e.g., "cost = fixed + var * DAU").

prior_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — dotted path into the entry frontmatter (e.g., "cost_curves.api_usd_per_1m_tokens_sonnet_input").

expected_kind.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — expected result_shape.kind; resolver fails closed if mismatch.

prior_ref.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — atlas prior that sourced the inputs (omitted when sentinel fires).

sentinel.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — true iff no §6.3-compliant prior existed; value is a best-effort range, not a grounded number.

cost.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Cost — cost axis for this alternative.

value.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — computed point value (or sentinel string like "NEEDS_PRIOR").

units.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — units (e.g., "USD/month", "ms p95", "% uptime").

derivation.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — plain-English or LaTeX formula used (e.g., "cost = fixed + var * DAU").

prior_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — dotted path into the entry frontmatter (e.g., "cost_curves.api_usd_per_1m_tokens_sonnet_input").

expected_kind.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — expected result_shape.kind; resolver fails closed if mismatch.

prior_ref.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — atlas prior that sourced the inputs (omitted when sentinel fires).

sentinel.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — true iff no §6.3-compliant prior existed; value is a best-effort range, not a grounded number.

latency.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Latency — latency axis for this alternative.

value.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — computed point value (or sentinel string like "NEEDS_PRIOR").

units.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — units (e.g., "USD/month", "ms p95", "% uptime").

derivation.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — plain-English or LaTeX formula used (e.g., "cost = fixed + var * DAU").

prior_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — dotted path into the entry frontmatter (e.g., "cost_curves.api_usd_per_1m_tokens_sonnet_input").

expected_kind.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — expected result_shape.kind; resolver fails closed if mismatch.

prior_ref.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — atlas prior that sourced the inputs (omitted when sentinel fires).

sentinel.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Axis — true iff no §6.3-compliant prior existed; value is a best-effort range, not a grounded number.

availability.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto > Availability — availability axis for this alternative.

dominates.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto — ids of alternatives this one strictly dominates.

is_recommended.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto — true iff this alternative is the synthesizer-chosen frontier point.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto — one Pareto-frontier alternative (cost × latency × availability).

pareto_frontier.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Pareto — architecture alternatives on the cost × latency × availability frontier (>=3 required).

id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision — decision id (e.g., "D-01"). Stable across runs.

claim.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Claim — one-sentence claim this decision resolves (e.g., "Persist user sessions").

chosen_option.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Chosen Option — selected option (e.g., "Redis with 30-day TTL").

name.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Alternatives — alternative option considered.

reason_rejected.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Alternatives — one-line reason this option was not chosen.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Alternatives — alternative considered and rejected.

rationale.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Rationale — prose reason for the choice, grounded in priors + NFR math.

nfr_engine_trace_id.description: x-ui-surface=internal:decision-audit-link — UUID of the decision_audit row written via audit-writer for this decision.

kb_chunk_ids.description: x-ui-surface=internal:rag-provenance — UUIDs of kb_chunks rows retrieved for this decision.

kind.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Priors — which atlas prior primitive this refers to.

prior_path.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — dotted path into the entry frontmatter (e.g., "cost_curves.api_usd_per_1m_tokens_sonnet_input").

expected_kind.description: x-ui-surface=internal:math-resolver — expected result_shape.kind; resolver fails closed if mismatch.

prior_ref.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Priors — atlas pointer (company + prior id).

note.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Priors — reviewer-facing note on how this prior was used.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Priors — atlas prior consumed by a decision.

prior_refs.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Priors — atlas priors consumed (empty allowed only if sentinel fires).

needs_prior_sentinel.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Gaps — true iff no §6.3-compliant prior was available for ≥1 required primitive (Q4 policy).

missing_prior_kinds.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision > Gaps — primitives for which no compliant prior existed; non-empty iff needs_prior_sentinel=true.

final_confidence.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision — NFR interpreter final confidence (0..1).

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decision — single decision node with full provenance.

decisions.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Decisions — decision nodes with full provenance (nfr trace, kb chunks, priors).

id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Risks — F-numbered id sourced from M7 FMEA.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Risks — single risk (F-numbered from M7).

risks.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Risks — F-numbered risks sourced from M7 FMEA.

decision_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Derivation — D-NN id of the decision this chain links (matches decisions[].id).

decision_network_node.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Derivation — M4 decision_network.v1.json node id (e.g., DN.01-A = node.alternative).

nfrs_driving_choice.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Derivation — NFR.NN ids from M2 nfrs.v2.json that drove this choice.

kb_chunk_ids.description: x-ui-surface=internal:rag-provenance — kb_chunks ids (uuid or path#fragment) retrieved via RAG to ground this decision.

atlas_entry_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Derivation > Priors — KB-8 atlas entry id (e.g., "company-atlas/anthropic#latency-prior").

kind.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Derivation > Priors — which prior primitive this cites.

quote.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Derivation > Priors — short quote / summary of the prior used.

empirical_priors.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Derivation > Priors — KB-8 atlas empirical priors cited (per T6 guardrail).

fmea_refs.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Derivation > FMEA — FM.NN failure-mode refs from M8 fmea_early or fmea_residual.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Derivation — single derivation_chain entry per top-level decision (T6 portfolio guardrail).

derivation_chain.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Derivation — one entry per top-level decision (T6 guardrail #1).

chain_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Tail Latency — chain id from interface_specs.v1.json (e.g., AUTHORING_SPEC_EMIT).

user_facing_p95_ms.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Tail Latency — user-facing NFR p95 budget in ms.

sum_per_if_p95_ms.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Tail Latency — sum of per-IF p95 latencies along the chain (computed).

budget_ok.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Tail Latency — true iff sum_per_if_p95_ms ≤ user_facing_p95_ms.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Tail Latency — chain-level p95 reconciliation per T6 guardrail.

tail_latency_budgets.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Tail Latency — chain-level p95 budgets reconciled against interface_specs.v1 (T6 guardrail #3).

threshold.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Residual Risk — high_rpn_flag_threshold from fmea_residual.

flag_count.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Residual Risk — number of high-RPN flags surfaced.

id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Residual Risk — FM.NN id from fmea_residual.

predecessor_ref.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Residual Risk — predecessor FM id from fmea_early (preserved verbatim).

rpn.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Residual Risk — raw RPN (severity × likelihood × detectability).

weighted_rpn.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Residual Risk — weighted RPN (mitigation-status weighted).

criticality_category.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Residual Risk — LOW | MEDIUM LOW | MEDIUM | MEDIUM HIGH | HIGH.

open_residual_risk.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Residual Risk — open residual risk text.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Residual Risk — verbatim flag from fmea_residual.v1.json (T6 guardrail).

flags.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Residual Risk — verbatim flags[] from fmea_residual.v1.json.

residual_risk.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Residual Risk — verbatim from fmea_residual.v1.json (T6 guardrail #4).

flagged_ecs.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > HoQ — EC ids with no PC lever (flagged_ec_no_pc).

ec_id.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > HoQ > Targets — engineering characteristic id.

target.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > HoQ > Targets — target value (number or label).

constant_ref.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > HoQ > Targets — constant id (M2 constants.v2.json) or null.

items.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > HoQ > Targets — single target-values row.

target_values.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > HoQ > Targets — target-values table snapshot.

hoq.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > HoQ — embedded HoQ summary (T6 guardrail #5).

next_steps.description: x-ui-surface=section:Recommendation > Next Steps — ordered follow-on actions.

inputs_hash.description: x-ui-surface=internal:synthesis-repro — SHA-256 of canonicalized M2..M7 inputs + atlas slug list (reproducibility key).

model_version.description: x-ui-surface=internal:synthesis-repro — LLM model id used for prose/diagram synthesis (deterministic-rule-tree if pure).
